name: Family Care Circle
description:
Family Care Circle App is a digital health and care management platform designed to help families support elderly loved ones. It combines safety monitoring, health reminders, caregiver coordination, and family connectivity into a single, easy-to-use application.
The app enables seniors to maintain independence while giving families peace of mind through real-time insights, alerts, and communication tools.
features: Medicine reminders with tracking: Schedule doses, mark medicine as taken or missed, & monitor daily or weekly adherence trends.
Fall detection using phone motion sensors: Uses real device motion patterns to identify possible falls and trigger rapid alerts.
Video check-ins for family communication: Start instant check-in calls to visually confirm well-being and reduce isolation.
Caregiver scheduling and visit planning: Organize appointments, care visits, and recurring support tasks in one shared schedule.
Health data sharing: Share key health updates & status snippets with trusted family contacts.
AI-driven behavior alerts: Detect unusual activity, missed medication behavior, or reduced movement to surface early warnings.
Local pharmacy support: Local pharmacy search using location, track delivery stages.
